_readme: Published worked-example fixtures for the FS3 flash (Whitson & Brule Monograph 20 flash examples; Ahmed, Equations of State and PVT Analysis, worked flash/K-value examples). Armed by typing data from the books; CASE 12 of run-validation.mjs skips with a warning while the arrays are empty and gates once populated. Do NOT fill from memory - only from the printed pages.

coatsSmart._readme: FS4 scaffold for Coats & Smart, SPE 11197 (Application of a Regression-Based EOS PVT Program to Laboratory Data). Arm by typing the paper's fluid compositions (with C7+ MW/SG for the plus fraction), temperatures and measured saturation pressures / flash points from the printed pages. Unarmed while `fluids` is empty; CASE 17 of run-validation.mjs skips with a warning. Do NOT fill from memory - only from the printed paper.

fluids.citation: Coats & Smart SPE 11197, Oil/Gas N, table/page

separatorTests._readme: FS6 scaffold for published multistage separator-test data with a reported wellstream composition - e.g. the Good Oil Co. Well No. 4 report reproduced in Ahmed (Reservoir Engineering Handbook / Equations of State and PVT Analysis) and McCain (Properties of Petroleum Fluids), or Whitson & Brule Monograph 20 separator examples. Arm by typing the printed composition (with C7+ MW/SG), separator stage T/P, reservoir or bubble-point conditions, and the measured separator/stock-tank GORs, Bo and stock-tank API. Expect correlation-level tolerances (untuned EOS vs lab data), not oracle-level. Unarmed while `fluids` is empty; CASE 19 of run-validation.mjs skips with a warning. Do NOT fill from memory - only from the printed pages.
